description:
Design a Detailed Commercial PV system (pvsamv1) for a project in Phoenix, AZ using the SAM desktop application. Select a 'Canadian Solar Inc.' module with a nominal rating between 300 Wdc and 350 Wdc from the CEC database and an 'SMA America' inverter with a max AC power between 10 kWac and 20 kWac from the CEC database. Configure the system with exactly 4 inverters and valid electrical stringing to achieve a Total Nameplate DC capacity between 45.0 kWdc and 55.0 kWdc. Save the SAM project to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/detailed_hardware_design.sam and create a JSON summary file at /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/design_summary.json containing the exact names of the selected hardware and the final DC capacity using this structure:
{
  "module_selected": "<exact string from SAM module database>",
  "inverter_selected": "<exact string from SAM inverter database>",
  "total_dc_capacity_kw": 0.0,
  "inverter_count": 4
}
